intel.title: [CISA KEV] JoomShaper SP Page Builder - JoomShaper SP Page Builder Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-48908
廠商: JoomShaper
產品: SP Page Builder
漏洞名稱: JoomShaper SP Page Builder Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type Vulnerability
說明: JoomShaper SP Page Builder contains an unrestricted upload of file with dangerous type vulnerability that allows unauthenticated users to upload arbitrary files, ultimately resulting in the upload and execution of PHP code.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
修補截止日: 2026-07-10
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: JoomShaper SP Page Builder 存在任意檔案上傳漏洞（CVE-2026-48908），允許未授權攻擊者上傳並執行惡意 PHP 程式碼。此漏洞已被列入 CISA KEV 威脅清單，顯示已有在野攻擊活動，但本公司並未使用該產品。
analysis.recommendation: 公司資產清冊未包含受影響資產，無需處置。

intel.title: [CISA KEV] Langflow Langflow - Langflow Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-55255
廠商: Langflow
產品: Langflow
漏洞名稱: Langflow Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key Vulnerability
說明: Langflow contains an authorization bypass through user-controlled key vulnerability which allows an authenticated attacker to execute any flow belonging to another user by specifying the victim's flow ID in the request.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
修補截止日: 2026-07-10
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: Langflow 存在授權繞過漏洞（CVE-2026-55255），已通過身分驗證的攻擊者可藉由在請求中指定受害者的 Flow ID，執行屬於其他使用者的任何工作流。此漏洞已被 CISA 列入已知遭利用漏洞清單（KEV）。
analysis.recommendation: 公司資產清冊未包含受影響資產，無需處置。

intel.title: [CISA KEV] Joomlack Page Builder - Joomlack Page Builder Improper Access Control Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-56290
廠商: Joomlack
產品: Page Builder
漏洞名稱: Joomlack Page Builder Improper Access Control Vulnerability
說明: Joomlack Page Builder contains an improper access control vulnerability that could allow for remote code execution via unauthenticated arbitrary file upload.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
修補截止日: 2026-07-10
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: Joomlack Page Builder 存在存取控制不當漏洞（CVE-2026-56290），允許未授權的攻擊者透過上傳任意檔案執行遠端程式碼（RCE）。該漏洞已被 CISA 列入已知利用漏洞清單，面臨高度活躍的攻擊威脅。
analysis.recommendation: 公司資產清冊未包含受影響資產，無需處置。

intel.title: [CISA KEV] Adobe ColdFusion - Adobe ColdFusion Path Traversal Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-48282
廠商: Adobe
產品: ColdFusion
漏洞名稱: Adobe ColdFusion Path Traversal Vulnerability
說明: Adobe ColdFusion contains a path traversal vulnerability that could lead to arbitrary code execution in the context of the current user.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
修補截止日: 2026-07-10
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: Adobe ColdFusion 存在路徑遍歷漏洞（CVE-2026-48282），可能導致遠端任意程式碼執行，且已被列入 CISA KEV 證實有活躍攻擊。經評估，本公司並未使用該軟體，故無直接安全風險。
analysis.recommendation: 公司資產清冊未包含受影響資產，無需處置。
